name: Identifix Automotive Repair Information API
what_it_does: Identifix (Solera) automotive repair information and diagnostic REST API for mechanical shops, dealerships, and fleet maintenance programs providing OE-quality repair procedures, TSB data, and confirmed fix information. Enables AI agents to manage diagnostic trouble code (DTC) lookup and confirmed repair procedure retrieval for vehicle diagnostic automation, handle technical service bulletin (TSB) search and applicable vehicle filtering for recall and TSB compliance automation, access OE-level wiring diagram and component location data for vehicle repair guidance automation, retrieve labor time and repair estimate for service advisor quoting automation, manage vehicle identification and fitment lookup for parts and repair compatibility automation, handle ASE-style repair procedure search for technician repair guidance automation, access common failure pattern and confirmed fix database for first-time fix rate optimization, retrieve maintenance schedule and interval lookup for preventive maintenance automation, manage multi-make database covering 30+ years of vehicle history for fleet repair intelligence, and integrate Identifix with shop management systems, DMS, and fleet management platforms for connected automotive repair intelligence.
use_cases: Looking up DTC repairs from diagnostic automation agents
Retrieving TSBs from recall compliance agents
Quoting labor times from service advisor automation agents
Accessing wiring diagrams from technician support agents
not_for: Vehicle telematics and live OBD-II data (use Geotab or Samsara)
Parts catalog and pricing (use PartsTech or WHI Solutions)
New vehicle OEM warranty and technical assistance
best_when: An independent repair shop, fleet maintenance team, or dealership service department wanting AI agents to automate DTC diagnostics, TSB lookup, repair procedure retrieval, and labor time quoting using Identifix's confirmed fix database.
avoid_when: REPAIR PROCEDURE CURRENCY FOR SAFETY-CRITICAL SYSTEMS: Automated repair procedure retrieval from Identifix for safety-critical systems (brakes, airbags, steering, ADAS calibration) must verify procedure is current for exact model year and production date; OEM mid-year production changes create procedure variation not always reflected in third-party repair databases; validate safety-critical procedures against OEM service information portal. ADAS CALIBRATION PROCEDURE ACCURACY: Automated ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance Systems) calibration procedure lookup via Identifix must include OEM calibration tool requirement and target specification; ADAS calibration with incorrect procedure or missing OEM calibration tool creates calibration failure and customer safety liability. LABOR TIME GUIDE JURISDICTION VARIATION: Automated repair estimate using Identifix labor times must account for geographic labor rate and flag time variation; standard flat-rate labor times may differ from regional guide standards; automated customer estimate without regional labor time adjustment creates estimate accuracy issues.

auth.notes: Identifix uses OAuth and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Shoreview, Minnesota HQ (Solera subsidiary since 2014). Identifix founded 1987 by technicians. Acquired by Solera Holdings 2014. Repair information database with 40M+ confirmed fixes. 30+ years of domestic and import vehicle coverage. 5 ASE Master Technician telephone hotline. DTC lookup, TSB database, wiring diagrams, labor times. Integrates with Mitchell1, shop management systems. Competes with AllData (AutoZone), Mitchell1, and ProDemand (Bosch) for automotive repair information.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per technician or shop
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per technician license; shop and fleet volume pricing; API access for enterprise integration partners
pricing.notes: Shoreview MN (Solera). Annual subscription per technician. Shop and fleet volume pricing. API access for enterprise integration partners. Hotline support included.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; DTC and TSB queries throttled; no webhooks — request-response model

known_agent_gotchas: ADAS CALIBRATION OEM TOOL REQUIREMENT: Automated ADAS calibration procedure lookup via Identifix must include OEM-specific calibration target and scan tool requirement; generic calibration procedures without OEM tool specification create calibration failure; automated procedure delivery for ADAS-equipped vehicles must include equipment prerequisite validation before technician scheduling

PRODUCTION DATE VARIATION FOR MID-YEAR MODEL CHANGES: Identifix vehicle coverage uses year/make/model/engine; OEM mid-year production changes create procedure variation within same model year; automated repair procedure lookup without production date refinement may return incorrect procedure for vehicles built after mid-year production change; implement production date lookup for safety-critical repairs

DTC NETWORK AND SYSTEM CONTEXT FOR ACCURATE LOOKUP: Automated DTC lookup via Identifix requires vehicle network (OBD-II, CAN, LIN) and module context for multi-code diagnostic scenarios; isolated DTC lookup without accompanying freeze frame data and related codes creates incomplete diagnostic context; automated DTC interpretation must include full scan output for accurate confirmed fix retrieval

CONFIRMED FIX DATABASE COVERAGE BY VEHICLE AGE: Identifix confirmed fix database coverage is strongest for 5-15 year old vehicles with established failure patterns; very new vehicles (0-2 years old) and very old vehicles (25+ years) have limited confirmed fix data; automated repair recommendation for low-coverage vehicles must indicate data confidence level

LABOR TIME GUIDE VARIATION FROM REGIONAL STANDARDS: Identifix labor times are based on standard flat-rate methodology; some geographic regions use different labor time guides (MOTOR, Chilton, Mitchell); automated estimate using Identifix labor times without regional guide alignment may create customer estimate disagreement; validate labor time guide used by local market

API KEY NO SCOPE GRANULARITY: Identifix API key provides full database access without scope controls; production integration API keys should be separate from development keys; implement key rotation policy for shop management system integrations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Automotive repair information. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Vehicle diagnostic, repair procedure, and TSB data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Automotive repair info. SOC2. API key. US. Vehicle diagnostic and repair information.
